title: no escape.jar
description: this mod is a horror mod that adds a creepy ambiance to the game
body:
No esape.jar desc

This mod can intentionally interact with your desktop, windows, and applications as part of the gameplay experience.
This is NOT a virus or malware and will NOT damage your computer.

Everything is intentional and made for immersion and horror effects.

~~About :

no escape.har is a horror Minecraft mod inspired on the no escape virus andfocused on disturbing events, strange interactions, and psychological atmosphere.

The mod is currently in beta, meaning some features may be unfinished or unstable.

Current Features Custom entity Random horror events Desktop interaction effects Custom main menu Atmospheric and immersive gameplay Upcoming Features Full boss fight More entities Additional events Expanded mechanics and story ( some elements will be added later :> )

If you enjoy psychological horror mods that break immersion boundaries and create unexpected experiences, this mod is made for you.

The goal is to make Minecraft feel unpredictable, unsettling, and  ~~

DISCORD:

Join the community here:
